role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused exclusively on the Bengali script and language on the signage.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns consistent with the Bengal Delta.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified rice paddies and broadleaf trees, correctly noting the lack of botanical distinction between the two candidate countries.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Discussed utility pole design and road infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (pole hardware, brickwork style) to distinguish the region.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the country. The agents adhered strictly to their domains. The landscape and botanics agents correctly identified the shared geography of the Bengal Delta, while the linguistic and meta agents provided the necessary differentiation to select Bangladesh over India.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately identified Bengali script on the shop sign.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Correctly described the flat alluvial terrain and green paddy fields.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified rice cultivation and tropical vegetation.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described the concrete utility poles and road condition.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly described the brick construction and shop architecture.
